title: App Landing Hero Material AI
sourceTitle: App Landing Hero Material AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Modern 16:9 app landing-page hero for FocusFlow, built around a polished AI task planner double-phone UI showcase. Subject: FocusFlow is the visible app brand; the central phone mockups show tasks, calendar, progress analytics as crisp interface screens, with Plan Less. Finish More. as the main hero headline. Scene: Light gradient website-hero environment with a left-side brand logo and large title, central double-phone mockup, right-side feature cards, bottom user testimonial strip, and download QR area. Composition: Fixed horizontal 16:9 UI/UX homepage hero layout: left brand logo and headline block, central dual smartphone mockups, right stacked feature cards, bottom social-proof and QR elements, rounded cards, soft shadows, generous clean spacing. Signature Elements: Double phone mockups showing task, schedule, and data interfaces, right-side function cards, bottom user reviews, download QR block, rounded cards, soft shadows, and clean modern app landing-page polish. Style: Modern premium app promotion material with clean UI/UX website hero design, believable app screenshots, precise spacing, rounded interface cards, soft elevation, crisp icons, and polished SaaS launch-page finish. Color Palette: Light gradient background with the source purple-orange accent system, clean white interface surfaces, soft neutral shadows, dark readable text, and small warm highlight accents. Lighting: Soft studio-like product lighting with gentle screen glow, subtle card shadows, clean edge highlights on phone mockups, and an airy high-end web presentation feel. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Plan Less. Finish More. appears as the large readable hero headline; FocusFlow appears in the logo area; screen labels and feature-card text stay short, intentional, and legible. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
